Conclusion even Ōēż7B LLMs from diverse AI ecosystems can serve

We presented an iterative NAS pipeline that leverages structured iterative feedback, offering a lightweight, datainstruction-tuned LLMs to progressively generate and im- efficient, and low-budget paradigm for reproducible NAS
prove neural network architectures through a closed loop that is fully accessible without cloud infrastructure. We beof code generation, evaluation, and prompt refinement with lieve this positions iterative LLM-driven NAS as a practical
historical feedback memory. Unlike prior iterative LLM tool for researchers operating under hardware constraints,
optimization methods that rely on global elite retention or where the low search cost enables discovery of compact aroperate in constrained discrete search spaces, our pipeline chitectures that are candidates for deployment on resourceoperates entirely in an unconstrained open code space over limited devices.
